title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Orient Electric

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Orient Electric
jsonLd.description:
We at Orient Electric are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Orient Electric:
Orient Electric is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Orient Electric!
